name: OREGONFRUIT.COM
message: [AI generated] Oregonfruit.com is a business owned by Oregon Fruit Products LLC. Founded in 1935, the Oregon based company specializes in canned, frozen and shelf-stable fruit products. They provide a wide variety of premium fruits in their natural juices, wine and syrups which are commercially used in brewing, baking and cooking. Known for its quality and flavor, Oregon Fruit Products is committed to sustainability and supporting local growers.
